hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Describing your team and what they do -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- Talking About My Team -- The People I Work With
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 3 -- Talking About My Team

listenings.text: Hello, and welcome to the data team. Let me introduce the people you will work with. I am the team leader, and I work with five great members. We have two developers, Bruno and Lucas. They write code every day, and their main skill is Python. Maria is our data analyst. She studies the numbers, and her responsibility is data quality. Pedro is an expert in cloud systems. His skills are very strong, and he helps the other members. Ana is our newest member. She learns fast, and her goal is to become a developer. We are a small team, but our goal is clear: we deliver good data, fast. I am very proud of my people.
